user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 2 contains only museum and restaurant POIs (activities, meals); no work commitments or flights listed in its subtree.
Day 3 contains only leisure POIs and restaurants (islands, Distillery District, meals); no work commitments or flights listed.
Day 1 contains only museum and dining activities (AGO, restaurants, live music); no work commitments or flights listed.
